title: calyptrion diandrum
intro: Calyptrion diandrum, also known as caltrop or caltravion, is a plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae, native to Europe, Africa, and Asia. Calyptrion diandrum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of calyptrion diandrum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of calyptrion diandrum include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
